channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Politics Friday: Budget begins to take shape as leaders huddle
item.description: Friday at noon, MPR News politics editor Brian Bakst talks with the top budget adviser to the governor: Gov. Erin Campbell, commissioner of Minnesota Management and Budget. Then, a conversation with the new DFL Party Chair Richard Carlbom.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst and Matthew Alvarez, MPR News

item.title: The Latest: Trump’s tariffs slam world markets in the biggest blow since the pandemic hit in 2020
item.description: Asian shares slid further Friday after U.S. President Donald Trump’s tariffs sent shudders through Wall Street at a level of shock unseen since the COVID-19 pandemic pummeled world markets in 2020.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Rally and court hearing set for Maryland man mistakenly deported to El Salvador prison
item.description: HYATTSVILLE, Md. (AP) — Lawyers for a Maryland man who was mistakenly deported to a notorious prison in El Salvador will ask a federal judge on Friday to order the Trump Administration to return him to the U.S. The White House already has argued against the idea in legal briefs.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan couple freed from Mexican prison after US intervention
item.description: Paul and Christy Akeo had been arrested in Cancún on March 4 after a high-end resort company accused them of fraud.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Brown University to see half a billion in federal funding halted by Trump administration
item.description: A White House official says the Trump administration is planning to halt more than half a billion dollars in contracts and grants awarded to Brown University.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne Mumphrey And Seung Min Kim, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump wants Musk to stay with administration, says DOGE found something 'horrible' today
item.description: President Donald Trump said he wants Elon Musk to stay on his team "as long as possible" during a conversation with reporters Thursday, noting DOGE had found something "horrible.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Here's Gov. Joe Lombardo's plan to solve the Nevada housing crisis
item.description: A $250 million plan to spur construction of homes and apartments for low- to middle-income Nevadans is projected to provide homes for 16,000 people, according to officials who presented it Wednesday night in Carson City.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump's reciprocal tariffs a 'double-edged sword': Sen. Ron Johnson
item.description: Trump promised the tariffs will bring about "the golden age of America," but economists have warned a recession could happen.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Perkins, NewsNation

item.title: Judge says US government may have 'acted in bad faith' as he weighs contempt over deportation order
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge said Thursday that the Trump administration may have "acted in bad faith” by trying to rush Venezuelan migrants out of the country before a court could block their deportations to El Salvador. U.S.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, MICHAEL KUNZELMAN and ALANNA DURKIN RICHER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Here’s a closer look at Trump’s tariff plan: What to know about the new duties
item.description: Trump unveiled the new tariffs in a ceremony at the White House’s Rose Garden on Wednesday for a "Make America Wealthy Again" event.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: House Democrats to head to U.S.-Mexico border in California to scrutinize Trump security policies
item.description: A group of House Democrats will visit the southern border in California on Friday to "conduct oversight of Trump admin border policies firsthand.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ban on taxpayer-funded sex changes for prisoners sparks Dem walkout in Georgia House vote
item.description: All but two Democrats in the Georgia State House exited the chamber to avoid voting on a bill to ban taxpayer-funded transgender surgeries for inmates.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump administration back in court for deportation flight hearing
item.description: The Trump administration's DOJ is set to defend deportation flights under the Alien Enemies Act of 1798 in a Thursday hearing.
item.dc:creator: Tom Dempsey, NewsNation

item.title: President Trump, conservatives celebrate ‘absolutely massive’ Florida special elections sweep
item.description: President Donald Trump and other leading conservatives are celebrating a special election sweep in Florida, calling it a “huge win for America" and a rebuke to Democrat hopes for an upset in the deep red state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FLASHBACK: Unearthed photo shows smiling Obama touring SpaceX alongside 'Nazi nepo baby' Elon Musk
item.description: Before Elon Musk waded into the political arena with the Department of Government Efficiency, becoming a target of Democrats, he was considered an Obama ally.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dem congressman lashes Musk in opening salvo of populist bid in 2026 swing-state Senate race
item.description: Rep. Chris Pappas, D-N.H., on Thursday declared his candidacy in the 2026 race to succeed retiring Sen. Jeanne Shaheen for a key battleground state seat Republicans are eyeing.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Other DFL statewide officeholders break with Walz on return-to-office requirement
item.description: The attorney general, secretary of state and state auditor said they would keep existing telework rules in place because they are independent offices.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: White House defends not including Russia, North Korea on tariffs
item.description: The official said that President Trump has “recently threatened to impose strong sanctions on Russia” to further explain leaving out Moscow.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: National Security Council staffers fired in wake of Trump meeting with Laura Loomer
item.description: Multiple staff members on the White House National Security Council reportedly were fired Thursday following a meeting President Trump had with far-right activist Laura Loomer where she raised questions about their loyalty.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats call for confirmation hearing for Trump DC prosecutor nominee
item.description: Senate Judiciary Democrats are pushing for a rare hearing on a U.S. attorney nominee as they argue President Trump’s pick to lead the office in D.C., Ed Martin, is especially alarming and deserving of further scrutiny.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Trump’s tariffs won’t give US workers ‘any pain’: Karoline Leavitt
item.description: Roughly 60 countries are being singled out for the reciprocal tariffs, the majority of which are set at half of the tariff those countries place on U.S. goods.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Democrats find reasons for hope from elections, GOP stumbles
item.description: Embattled Democrats have new reason to hope. The party has spent the early months of the year soul-searching the causes of a bitter election defeat and fighting internally over how best to counter President Trump and his fierce effort to dismantle the traditional workings of Washington.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fired or frustrated federal workers may have eager employers waiting for them in Minnesota
item.description: For federal workers, the past few months have been filled with uncertainty as the Trump administration pushes ahead with efforts to reduce the size of government agencies. But whether they are forced or choose to leave, those workers may find employers eager to hire them.
item.dc:creator: Mark Zdechlik, MPR News

item.title: 5 things to know about Republicans’ new blueprint to pass Trump's agenda
item.description: Senate Republicans on Wednesday rolled out a 70-page blueprint to advance President Trump’s tax agenda, along with directions that could pave the way for more than a trillion dollars in cuts to government spending.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Social Security's acting leader faces calls to resign over decision to cut Maine contracts
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Social Security Administration's acting commissioner is facing calls to resign after he issued an order — which was quickly rescinded — that would have required Maine parents to register their newborns for Social Security numbers at a federal office rather than the hospital.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN and PATRICK WHITTLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Federal judge questions whether EPA move to rapidly cancel 'green bank' grants was legal
item.description: A federal judge on Wednesday pressed an attorney for the Environmental Protection Agency about whether the agency broke the law when it swiftly terminated $20 billion worth of grants awarded to nonprofits for a green bank by allegedly bulldozing past proper rules and raising flimsy accusations of wa
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL PHILLIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scott Walker: 'Big money' won Susan Crawford a Supreme Court seat
item.description: Crawford defeated conservative Brad Schimel by 10 points in the officially nonpartisan race, cementing a liberal majority on the court.
item.dc:creator: Damita Menezes, NewsNation

item.title: Trump restoring millions in family planning funds for two states
item.description: The Trump administration is restoring millions of dollars in Title X funds to Oklahoma and Tennessee after the Biden administration chose to withhold those funds because both states failed to comply with program rules.
item.dc:creator: Alejandra O'Connell-Domenech, NewsNation

item.title: No bathroom breaks: How Booker accomplished record Senate speech
item.description: Sen. Cory Booker (D-N.J.) set a new record for the longest Senate speech in history on Monday and Tuesday by holding the upper chamber’s floor for more than 25 hours.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Federal judge drops corruption case against New York City Mayor Eric Adams
item.description: Adams was scheduled to go on trial in April until new leadership at the Justice Department under the Trump administration ordered prosecutors in New York in February to drop the case, sparking a public outcry and resignations of prosecutors.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Lucas and Carrie Johnson, MPR News

item.title: Who is Susan Crawford? Wisconsin Supreme Court winner has fought for union and abortion rights
item.description: Wisconsin Supreme Court winner Susan Crawford has served as a Dane County Circuit Court judge since 2018. Crawford won election that year and again in 2022 to the seat. The county is home to Wisconsin’s liberal capital, Madison.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Layoffs begin at U.S. health agencies responsible for research, tracking disease and regulating food
item.description: Employees across the massive U.S. Health and Human Services Department began receiving notices of dismissal Tuesday in an overhaul ultimately expected to lay off up to 10,000 people.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Yale professor leaving US: Trump launching 'brutal attack' on freedom
item.description: A professor at Yale University said Monday he would be leaving his post and the country over the Trump administration’s “brutal attack” on free speech.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Musk says he sent MAGA influencer Ashley St. Clair $2.5 million, open to paternity test
item.description: Musk’s comments came after St. Clair was seen selling her Tesla, saying she was doing so after Musk allegedly cut childcare payments.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Private school voucher bill clears first test in Texas House
item.description: The House Public Education Committee voted to advance a pair of priority bills to create education savings accounts and to raise how much state money public school districts receive.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Jaden Edison, KPRC 2

item.title: Luna accuses House Freedom Caucus of smear; exits group over parental proxy voting battle
item.description: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-Fla.) announced Monday that she is leaving the House Freedom Caucus amid her battle with GOP leadership and hard-line Republicans over her push to allow proxy voting for new parents.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: White House to remove magnolia tree dating to Andrew Jackson
item.description: Trump added that White House staff will preserve the Magnolia tree’s “Historic wood,” which, Trump said, “may be used for other high and noble purposes!!!”
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5
